component.name: Poetit
component.summary: Poetry editor with meter, rhyme, thesaurus, and version control

description.p: Poetit is a line-by-line poetry editor built with Python and tkinter. It counts syllables, marks stress patterns, detects rhyme schemes, provides thesaurus lookup, and tracks poem history with Git.

ul.li: Syllable counts via bundled CMU Pronouncing Dictionary
Rhyme scheme detection and word-level rhyme lookup
Thesaurus and WordNet definitions (bundled, no internet required)
Git-based version control with commit history browser
